## Summary

<!-- One-paragraph description. What changed and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Build / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] If touching DB schema, ran `npm run db:generate` and committed the migration
- [ ] If touching auth / billing / multi-tenant code, manually re-tested the affected flow
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or PII in the diff
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated under `## [Unreleased]` (for user-visible changes)
